themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "And he shall offer thereof his offering, even an offering made by fire unto the LORD; the fat...". Word-study detail reinforces "אִשֶּׁ֖ה: an offering made by fire - properly, a burnt-offering; but occasionally of any sacr...".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And if his offering for a sacrifice of peace offering unto the LORD be of the flock; male or...". Word-study detail reinforces "שְׁלָמִ֖ים: of peace offering - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".
